King George Athens

★★★★★
🏛️ Acropolis View🍸 Rooftop Bar👑 Luxury
from €380 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Boutique luxury hotel next to Grande Bretagne with intimate atmosphere and Tudor Hall restaurant.

Who Should Consider King George Athens

King George Athens is a 5-star luxury price-signal hotel in Syntagma, with an Acropolis-view signal and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for luxury, couples, fine dining.

  • Compare the area on the Syntagma hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

RestaurantSpaButler ServiceGym

✓ Pros

  • Intimate luxury
  • Amazing restaurant
  • Personal service

✗ Cons

  • Expensive
  • Smaller than GB

Location

Located in Syntagma, 12-15 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 12-15 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro
